message:
fix(server): replace Vec with VecDeque for action outcomes, harden retention counters, and rename System Health to Mail UI

- tui_app: switch action_outcomes from Vec to VecDeque for O(1) eviction;
  rename all "System Health URL" user-facing strings to "Mail UI";
  pass screen_key and screen_title to web dashboard frame capture
- console: minor refactor (unchanged behavior)
- mail_ui: remove unused root_id/root_thread_ref bindings; simplify
  sibling-update action validation with eq_ignore_ascii_case instead of
  allocating a lowercased copy; fix expect message wording in test
- retention: replace all counter += with saturating_add to prevent
  overflow; replace glob::Pattern dependency with inline wildcard_match;
  rewrite count_old_messages to use chrono and recursive stack-based
  traversal with symlink rejection; use saturating_add in dir_size and
  count_md_files_recursive
- lib: expanded server module registrations and routes (ATC integration,
  web dashboard enhancements)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
